queries.name: Pipeline Error Analysis
queries.description: Find all ERROR-level log events from Jenkins pipeline runs in the last 24 hours
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, @message, build_number, stage, @logStream
| filter @message like /ERROR|Exception|FAILED/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

queries.name: Security Gate Failure Events
queries.description: Identify which security gate (coverage, vulns, risk score) caused pipeline failures
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, build_number, gate_name, gate_value, threshold
| filter event_type = 'SECURITY_GATE_FAILURE'
| stats count(*) as failures by gate_name
| sort failures desc

queries.name: High-Risk Deployment Approvals
queries.description: Audit trail of manually approved high-risk deployments
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, build_number, approver, risk_score, risk_level, commit_sha
| filter event_type = 'HIGH_RISK_APPROVED'
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

queries.name: Application Error Rate by Endpoint
queries.description: Identify endpoints with elevated 5xx error rates
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, method, path, status_code, duration_ms, pod_name
| filter status_code >= 500
| stats count(*) as error_count, avg(duration_ms) as avg_latency_ms by path
| sort error_count desc
| limit 20

queries.name: Slow Requests (p99 > 2s)
queries.description: Find requests with latency exceeding 2 seconds
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, method, path, duration_ms, pod_name
| filter duration_ms > 2000
| stats count(*) as slow_count, pct(duration_ms, 99) as p99_ms, max(duration_ms) as max_ms by path
| sort slow_count desc

queries.name: OPA Gatekeeper Policy Violations
queries.description: Track admission webhook denials by constraint type
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, objectRef.namespace, objectRef.name, objectRef.resource, responseStatus.reason
| filter verb in ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] and responseStatus.code = 403
| filter responseStatus.reason like /GatekeeperConstraint/
| stats count(*) as violations by objectRef.resource, responseStatus.reason
| sort violations desc

queries.name: Critical Vulnerability Detections Over Time
queries.description: Track critical CVE events across pipeline runs
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, build_number, package_name, cve_id, severity, fixed_version
| filter event_type = 'SNYK_VULNERABILITY' and severity = 'critical'
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 50

queries.name: ArgoCD Sync Events and Outcomes
queries.description: Monitor ArgoCD application sync success/failure patterns
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, app_name, sync_status, health_status, image_tag, triggered_by
| filter event_type = 'APP_SYNC'
| sort @timestamp desc
| stats count(*) as syncs, 
    sum(sync_status = 'Synced') as successful, 
    sum(sync_status = 'Failed') as failed
  by app_name
| limit 20

queries.name: EKS Audit – Privileged Operations
queries.description: Detect privileged Kubernetes API calls for security monitoring
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, user.username, verb, objectRef.resource, objectRef.name, objectRef.namespace, sourceIPs.0
| filter verb in ['delete', 'patch', 'update'] 
  and objectRef.resource in ['secrets', 'configmaps', 'clusterrolebindings']
| filter user.username not like /^system:/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

queries.name: Pipeline Stage Duration Trend
queries.description: Track build stage durations to identify performance regressions
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, build_number, stage_name, duration_seconds
| filter event_type = 'STAGE_COMPLETE'
| stats avg(duration_seconds) as avg_secs,
    pct(duration_seconds, 95) as p95_secs
  by stage_name
| sort p95_secs desc

queries.name: Mean Time To Recovery (MTTR)
queries.description: Calculate MTTR from pipeline failure to next successful build
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, build_number, result, duration_minutes
| filter event_type = 'BUILD_COMPLETE'
| sort @timestamp asc
| stats count(*) as total_builds,
    sum(result = 'FAILURE') as failures,
    avg(case when result = 'SUCCESS' then duration_minutes else 0 end) as avg_recovery_minutes
  by bin(1h)

queries.name: Image Signature Verification Failures
queries.description: Detect unsigned or tampered image admission attempts
queries.query:
fields @timestamp, image_ref, pod_name, namespace, reason
| filter event_type = 'COSIGN_VERIFY_FAILED'
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 50
